name: No Bake Rum Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Sifted confectioner's sugar, for dredging
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the last (sifted confectioner's sugar) in a bowl and mix well using your hands.
2. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Dredge each ball in sifted confectioner's sugar.
4. Store these cookies in an airtight container for up to 10 days.
